notes_zh:
🎉🎉🎉 祝大家五一劳动节玩的快乐、玩得开心🎉🎉🎉

### 主窗口

- **新增** 双击列表条目直接复制（多选时合并复制）；单击保留为选中查看。右键菜单的「复制」也提到第一项（#42，感谢 @vvair 的反馈）

### 接力模式

- **新增** 「全部粘贴」按钮 + 全局快捷键 `⌥⌃V`：一次性顺序粘贴队列中所有剩余条目，每条之间留 150ms 给目标 App 处理；中途点同一按钮可停止；暂停 / 退出接力时自动停下；已完成 / 已跳过的条目不会被重粘（#42）
- **新增** 队列条目右键「设为当前」/ 双击 直接跳转。超过十几条的队列里再也不用按 N 次「跳过 / 上一条」翻动；前进跳跃自动把跨过的条目标 skipped（等同连按多次跳过），倒退跳跃把跨过的条目重置为 pending（"重新处理这一段"），也支持双击曾经被 skipped 的条目恢复处理（#42）
- **修复** 接力窗口拖到屏幕其它位置后，添加 / 删除条目或调整宽度时不再弹回右上角；每次重新打开仍默认右上（#42）

### 状态栏

- **新增** 状态栏图标左键动作可配置：默认仍是弹菜单，也可改成「打开管理器 / 快捷粘贴 / 切换接力 / 暂停剪贴板监听 / 打开设置」之一；右键始终弹菜单。在 设置 →「状态栏图标」下方（#42）

---
notes_en:
🎉🎉🎉 Happy Labor Day — wishing everyone a joyful, relaxing holiday! 🎉🎉🎉

### Main Window

- **New** Double-click a row to copy (merge-copy when multi-selected); single-click still selects for preview. The "Copy" entry in the row context menu is now first (#42, thanks @vvair)

### Relay Mode

- **New** "Paste All" button + global hotkey `⌥⌃V` — pastes every remaining queue item in order with a 150ms gap between each so the target app can keep up. Click again to stop mid-flight; pause/exit also halts gracefully. Items already done or skipped are not re-pasted (#42)
- **New** Right-click any queue row → "Set as Current", or double-click to jump directly. No more N-times skip/previous for large queues. Forward jumps mark intermediate items as skipped (equivalent to repeated skips); backward jumps reset intermediate items to pending so the segment can be re-processed; double-clicking a previously-skipped item brings it back as the active one (#42)
- **Fix** After dragging the relay panel to another position, adding/removing items or resizing the width no longer snaps it back to the top-right corner (it still resets to top-right on each reopen) (#42)

### Status Bar

- **New** Configurable left-click action for the status bar icon. Default stays "show menu", or pick "Open Manager / Quick Paste / Toggle Relay / Toggle Clipboard Monitoring / Open Settings". Right-click always shows the menu. Settings → Status Bar Icon (#42)
